title: Amtech S0310 Utility Knife
features: DURABLE: This utility knife has a strong aluminium body and spring steel blades
EASY TO USE: With a double overlap blade guard and internal blade storage, blade adjustment is easy with one hand
VERSATILE: It is ideal for cutting carpet, linoleum, cardboard and leather
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning Yes Box Contains 1x Knife with 5 Blades See more
